_comment: APS Control System - Hierarchical Channel Database. SR and BTS power supply channels from sr_bts_ps.json. Device names are PV prefixes (e.g. S02A:FH1). Subfield keys are PV suffixes (e.g. :PS:SetCurrentC). Full PV = device + subfield (e.g. S02A:FH1:PS:SetCurrentC).

SR._description: Storage Ring (SR): Main synchrotron light source. 12-sector electron storage ring operating at 1.9 GeV. Contains magnets, diagnostics, vacuum, and RF systems for stable beam circulation and photon production.

MAG._description: Magnet System (MAG): APS Storage Ring power supplies. All 40 sectors with A, B, and some C girders. PV address = device prefix + suffix (e.g., S02A:FH1:PS:SetCurrentC).

FAST_CORR._description: Fast Correctors (FAST_CORR): Fast H and V steering magnets for orbit feedback. 8 per sector (FH1, FH2, FV1, FV2 on A and B girders). Used in fast orbit feedback systems.

:DCCT:CurrentM._description: DCCT output, DCCT current, external current

CORR._description: Slow Correctors (CORR): H and V steering magnets for DC orbit correction. H1, H7, V1, V7 on A/B girders, plus H2, V2 on C girder for select sectors.

:DCCT:CurrentM._description: DCCT output, DCCT current, external current

SKEW_QUAD._description: Skew Quadrupoles (SKEW_QUAD): Coupling correction magnets. SQ1, SQ2 on A and B girders.

:DCCT:CurrentM._description: DCCT output, DCCT current, external current

DIPOLE_TRIM._description: Dipole Trims (DIPOLE_TRIM): Trim coils for fine orbit and energy adjustments. M3T, M4T, Q4T, Q5T, Q8T on A/B girders.

:DCCT:CurrentM._description: DCCT output, DCCT current, external current

DIPOLE_CM1._description: C-Girder Dipoles (DIPOLE_CM1): Sector C:M1 dipoles in select sectors.

:DCCT:CurrentM._description: DCCT output, DCCT current, external current

QUAD._description: Quadrupoles (QUAD): Individual focusing magnets. Q1, Q2, Q3, Q6, Q7 on A/B girders. Control betatron tune.

:DCCT:CurrentM._description: DCCT output, DCCT current, external current

SEXT._description: Sextupoles (SEXT): Chromaticity correction magnets. S1, S2, S3 on A/B girders.

:DCCT:CurrentM._description: DCCT output, DCCT current, external current

DIPOLE._description: Sector Dipoles (DIPOLE): Main bending magnets per sector. M3, M4, Q4, Q5, Q8 on A/B girders.

:DCCT:CurrentM._description: DCCT output, DCCT current, external current

MAIN_DIPOLE_M1._description: Main 1 Dipole (M1): Primary ring-wide bending magnet supply S:M1.

MAIN_DIPOLE_M2._description: Main 2 Dipole (M2): Secondary ring-wide bending magnet supply S:M2.

RAW_PS._description: Raw Power Supplies (RAW_PS): Sector-pair raw DC supplies R1-R4 (pairs: 40-1, 2-3, ..., 38-39).

VAC._description: Vacuum System (VAC): Ultra-high vacuum monitoring in the storage ring. Cold Cathode Gauges (CCG) and Convection Vacuum Gauges (CVG) at arc sections, insertion device straights, and C-sections. Target pressure: <1e-9 Torr. PV example: S02:CCG1:PressureM

CCG._description: Cold Cathode Gauges (CCG): Inverted magnetron gauges for UHV pressure measurement. Range: 1e-11 to 1e-3 Torr. Located at arc sections (S{sector}:CCG1), insertion device straights (S{sector}ID:CCG1), and C-sections (S{sector}C:CCG1).

:PressureM._description: Pressure (read-only): Vacuum pressure in Torr. Normal operation: <1e-9 Torr. Alarm threshold typically 1e-7 Torr.

CVG._description: Convection Vacuum Gauges (CVG): Convection-enhanced Pirani gauges for rough/medium vacuum monitoring. Range: atmosphere to ~1e-4 Torr. Used for pump-down monitoring and rough vacuum interlocks.

:PressureM._description: Pressure (read-only): Convection gauge vacuum pressure in Torr. Used for rough vacuum monitoring and pump-down.

RF._description: RF System (RF): Storage ring RF system providing beam energy replenishment. 4 klystron stations (sectors 1-4) feeding 16 superconducting cavities in sectors 36-40. Includes frequency measurement, cavity gap voltage, klystron power, and feedback systems.

FREQUENCY._description: RF Frequency: SR revolution frequency and RF source measurements. Includes nominal frequencies for SR, booster injection, and booster extraction.

VALUE._description: Direct value readback (read-only). SR nominal freq (~352.962 MHz), booster injection/extraction freq, HP53181 counter frequency readback, VVM phase.

KLYSTRON_PS._description: Klystron Power Supplies: High-voltage power supplies for the 4 RF klystrons. SRF:P1 (sector 1), SRF:P2 (sector 2), S3:KPS (sector 3), S4:KPS (sector 4).

:beamVoltageV._description: Beam voltage (read-only): klystron cathode-to-collector voltage in Volts

:beamCurrent._description: Beam current (read-only): klystron electron beam current in Amps

:highVoltageReady._description: HV ready (read-only): high voltage supply ready

:modAnodeReady._description: Mod anode ready (read-only): modulating anode ready

:modAnodeOnOff._description: Mod anode on/off (read-only): modulating anode state

:cathodeSupplyOnOff._description: Cathode supply on/off (read-only): cathode heater state

:unitFault._description: Unit fault (read-only): power supply fault status

KLYSTRON_RF._description: Klystron RF: RF drive, forward/reflected power, and feedback for the 4 klystron stations.

:WfDataPtCh5._description: Waveform channel 5 (read-only): klystron forward power waveform sample

:WfDataPtCh7._description: Waveform channel 7 (read-only): klystron reflected power waveform sample

:rfDriveStatM._description: RF drive status (read-only): RF drive on/off state

:FB_EngageBI._description: Feedback engaged (read-only): RF amplitude feedback loop status

:PssIntrTallyOK._description: PSS interlock OK (read-only): personnel safety system interlock status

:colDissInterlockStat._description: Collector dissipation interlock (read-only): collector overpower protection

:colInterlockDisSW._description: Collector interlock disable switch (read-only): interlock bypass state

KLYSTRON_POWER._description: Klystron Power Detectors: Envelope detector power measurements for klystrons 1 and 2.

:ED1:Ch1KWatt._description: Envelope detector 1 Ch1 (read-only): klystron output power in kW

CAVITY._description: RF Cavities: 16 superconducting RF cavities (4 per sector in S36, S37, S38, S40). Each cavity has gap voltage, vacuum, and thermal monitoring.

:GapVolt._description: Gap voltage (read-only): accelerating voltage across cavity gap in MV

:VGC.PRES._description: Vacuum gauge pressure (read-only): cavity vacuum in Torr

SECTOR_RF._description: Sector RF Summary: Per-sector total power, total gap voltage, and feedback system status for RF sectors S36, S37, S38, S40.

:AveragePowerM._description: Average power (read-only): total sector RF power in kW

:cavTotalGapVolt._description: Total gap voltage (read-only): sum of all cavity gap voltages in sector

POWER_DETECTORS._description: Envelope detector power readings (forward and reflected per cavity pair)

:ED1:Ch0KWatt._description: ED1 Ch0 forward power (read-only) in kW

:ED1:Ch1KWatt._description: ED1 Ch1 reflected power (read-only) in kW

:ED2:Ch0KWatt._description: ED2 Ch0 forward power (read-only) in kW

:ED2:Ch1KWatt._description: ED2 Ch1 reflected power (read-only) in kW

:ED3:Ch0KWatt._description: ED3 Ch0 forward power (read-only) in kW

:ED3:Ch1KWatt._description: ED3 Ch1 reflected power (read-only) in kW

:ED4:Ch0KWatt._description: ED4 Ch0 forward power (read-only) in kW

:ED4:Ch1KWatt._description: ED4 Ch1 reflected power (read-only) in kW

:FB1:pidSpCh0AI._description: FB1 PID setpoint Ch0 (read-only): feedback loop 1 setpoint

:FB1:pidSpCh1AI._description: FB1 PID setpoint Ch1 (read-only): feedback loop 1 setpoint

:FB2:pidSpCh0AI._description: FB2 PID setpoint Ch0 (read-only): feedback loop 2 setpoint

:FB2:pidSpCh1AI._description: FB2 PID setpoint Ch1 (read-only): feedback loop 2 setpoint

CAVITY_FAULTS._description: Cavity RF Fault Summary: Interlock and fault status per klystron sector cavity group.

:SL1RfFltSum._description: Slot 1 RF fault summary (read-only): combined fault status for cavity slot 1

:SL2RfFltSum._description: Slot 2 RF fault summary (read-only): combined fault status for cavity slot 2

IR_DETECTOR._description: Cavity IR Detectors: Infrared thermal monitors on upstream (US) and downstream (DS) sides of each cavity. Detect cavity surface heating.

:US:IrDetector._description: Upstream IR detector (read-only): cavity upstream surface temperature

:DS:IrDetector._description: Downstream IR detector (read-only): cavity downstream surface temperature

ACCESS_CONTROL._description: RF Access Control and AGC: System-wide RF access control and automatic gain control.

VALUE._description: Direct readback (read-only): access control state, AGC feedback output

WAVEGUIDE_SWITCH._description: Waveguide Switch (WGS): Sector 6 waveguide switch system for RF power routing. Controls which cavities receive RF power.

:modeSelect._description: Mode select (read-write): waveguide routing mode selection

DIAG._description: Diagnostic System (DIAG): Beam measurement and monitoring instrumentation. Includes beam position monitors (BPMs) for orbit measurement, beam current monitors (DCCT), and radiation safety monitors.

BPM._description: Beam Position Monitors (BPM): Measure transverse beam position at 14 locations per sector (A:P0-P6, B:P0-P6). 559 BPMs across 40 sectors. PV example: S02A:P1:x:SampledAdjustedM

X_POSITION._description: Horizontal (x) beam position measurements and settings

:x:SampledAdjustedM._description: x adjusted position (read-only): sampled beam position with offset and gain applied

:x:LowPass1sAdjustedM._description: x 1s low-pass adjusted position (read-only): 1-second filtered position

:x:LowPass8sAdjustedM._description: x 8s low-pass adjusted position (read-only): 8-second filtered position

:x:LowPass64sAdjustedM._description: x 64s low-pass adjusted position (read-only): 64-second filtered position

:x:SampledM._description: x raw sampled position (read-only): unprocessed beam position

:x:RfSetpointC._description: x RF setpoint (read-write): RF orbit setpoint

:x:GainM._description: x gain (read-only): BPM gain calibration factor

X_ERROR._description: Horizontal (x) beam position errors (deviation from setpoint)

:x:SampledRfErrorM._description: x RF sampled error (read-only): deviation from RF setpoint

:x:LowPass1sRfErrorM._description: x RF 1s low-pass error (read-only): 1s filtered RF error

:x:LowPass8sRfErrorM._description: x RF 8s low-pass error (read-only): 8s filtered RF error

:x:LowPass64sRfErrorM._description: x RF 64s low-pass error (read-only): 64s filtered RF error

:x:SampledErrorM._description: x sampled error (read-only): deviation from setpoint

Y_POSITION._description: Vertical (y) beam position measurements and settings

:y:SampledAdjustedM._description: y adjusted position (read-only): sampled beam position with offset and gain applied

:y:LowPass1sAdjustedM._description: y 1s low-pass adjusted position (read-only): 1-second filtered position

:y:LowPass8sAdjustedM._description: y 8s low-pass adjusted position (read-only): 8-second filtered position

:y:LowPass64sAdjustedM._description: y 64s low-pass adjusted position (read-only): 64-second filtered position

:y:SampledM._description: y raw sampled position (read-only): unprocessed beam position

:y:GainM._description: y gain (read-only): BPM gain calibration factor

Y_ERROR._description: Vertical (y) beam position errors (deviation from setpoint)

:y:SampledErrorM._description: y sampled error (read-only): deviation from setpoint

DCCT._description: DC Current Transformer: Non-intercepting beam current monitor. Measures total circulating beam current with high accuracy.

CURRENT._description: Beam Current (milliAmperes): Total circulating electron current. Typical range: 1-500 mA.

RB._description: Current Readback (read-only): Standard beam current measurement.

VALID._description: Valid Status (read-only): DCCT measurement is valid and calibrated.

NEUTRON._description: Neutron Radiation Monitors: Detect neutron radiation levels around accelerator. Real-time monitoring for personnel safety.

DOSE_RATE._description: Neutron Dose Rate (mrem/hour): Neutron radiation intensity measurement.

AVG_1MIN._description: 1-Minute Average (read-only): Neutron dose rate averaged over 1 minute.

AVG_1HR._description: 1-Hour Average (read-only): Neutron dose rate averaged over 1 hour.

STATUS._description: Neutron Monitor Status: Data validity and alarm conditions.

VALID._description: Valid Data (read-only): Monitor reading is valid.

ALARM._description: Alarm Status (read-only): Radiation level exceeds safety threshold.

GAMMA._description: Gamma Radiation Monitors: Detect gamma ray radiation levels around accelerator. Essential for personnel safety.

DOSE_RATE._description: Gamma Dose Rate (mrem/hour): Gamma radiation intensity measurement.

AVG_1MIN._description: 1-Minute Average (read-only): Gamma dose rate averaged over 1 minute.

AVG_1HR._description: 1-Hour Average (read-only): Gamma dose rate averaged over 1 hour.

STATUS._description: Gamma Monitor Status: Operational health and alarm state.

ALARM._description: Alarm Status (read-only): Gamma level exceeds safety limit.

SB_BPM._description: Single-Bunch BPMs (SB_BPM): Turn-by-turn single bunch position monitors. Available in sectors 1, 2, 40 (6 per sector) plus S38A:P0, S39C:P0, S40A:P0. PV pattern: S01SB-A:P1:x

:x._description: x single-bunch position (read-only): turn-by-turn horizontal position

:y._description: y single-bunch position (read-only): turn-by-turn vertical position

BR._description: Booster Ring (BR): Accelerates electron beam from 150 MeV (linac energy) to 1.9 GeV before injection into the storage ring. Compact ring with 4-fold symmetry, operates at 1-10 Hz repetition rate.

MAG._description: Booster Magnet System: Ramped magnets that track the beam energy during acceleration. Dipoles define the orbit, quadrupoles maintain focusing.

DIPOLE._description: Booster Dipole Magnets: Main bending magnets, ramped during acceleration cycle to increase beam energy.

CURRENT._description: Dipole excitation current (Amperes). Ramped to increase beam energy during acceleration.

SP._description: Current Setpoint (read-write): Programmed ramp profile for acceleration.

RB._description: Current Readback (read-only): Measured dipole current during ramping.

READY._description: Ready (read-only): Power supply ready for ramping.

QF._description: Booster Focusing Quadrupoles: Maintain beam focusing during energy ramp.

QD._description: Booster Defocusing Quadrupoles: Maintain beam focusing during energy ramp.

DIAG._description: Booster Diagnostics: Beam measurement during acceleration cycle.

BPM._description: Booster BPMs: Measure beam position during acceleration. 8 BPMs for orbit measurement.

VALID._description: Valid Data (read-only): BPM reading is valid.

DCCT._description: Booster Beam Current Monitor: Tracks current during acceleration cycle.

RB._description: Current Readback (read-only): Beam current during acceleration.

BTS._description: Booster-to-Storage Ring Transfer Line (BTS): Beam transport from booster to storage ring.

MAG._description: BTS Magnet System: Booster-to-Storage Ring transfer line power supplies.

BOOSTER_BTS_CORR._description: Booster-to-BTS Correctors: H/V correctors in booster extraction (AH1-AH3, AV1-AV3).

:DCCT:CurrentM._description: DCCT output, DCCT current, external current

BTS_SR_CORR._description: BTS-to-SR Correctors: H/V correctors in injection section.

:DCCT:CurrentM._description: DCCT output, DCCT current, external current

BOOSTER_BTS_QUAD._description: Booster-to-BTS Quadrupoles: Focusing quads in booster extraction (AQ1-AQ5).

:DCCT:CurrentM._description: DCCT output, DCCT current, external current

BTS_SR_QUAD._description: BTS-to-SR Quadrupoles: Focusing quads in injection (BQ1-BQ5, CQ1-CQ3, DQ1-DQ2).

:DCCT:CurrentM._description: DCCT output, DCCT current, external current
DCCT output, DCCT current, external current
DCCT output, DCCT current, external current
DCCT output, DCCT current, external current

BTS_RAW_PS._description: BTS Raw Power Supplies: DC supplies (DC1-DC4).

VAC._description: BTS Vacuum System: Vacuum monitoring in the booster-to-storage ring transfer line.

:PressureM._description: Pressure (read-only): BTS vacuum pressure in Torr.
Pressure (read-only): BTS convection gauge pressure in Torr.
